# Tikron

> Tikron is a **source-available (Tikron License 1.0), server-authoritative multiplayer SDK for web games**
> ("Supabase for game netcode", but self-hosted). You author a `Room<TState>` subclass
> (state shape + `onMessage` intent handlers) and deploy it to **your own Cloudflare
> account** — one Durable Object per room at the edge, placed near players, no lock-in.
> Clients send intents, the server owns state, every payload is validated. Optional
> hosted services (leaderboards + a usage dashboard, keyed by API key) are the only
> managed part. A pnpm + Turborepo monorepo; the primary user is a coding agent building
> a game for a non-developer. See AGENTS.md → "Limits & roadmap" before committing.

## Start here

- [AGENTS.md](AGENTS.md): Read first. The operational brief — genre→preset table, the
  golden path (scaffold → run → deploy, incl. a headless / `CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN` deploy
  recipe), pointer / `touch-action` input, the schema/protocol handshake, ops & observability
  (`Room.onError`, `tk:stats` drops/errors), identity & auth, hosted leaderboards, hard rules,
  command reference, error-code tables, and measured limits.
- [.claude/skills/tikron/SKILL.md](.claude/skills/tikron/SKILL.md): Read when
  building/modifying a room. Preset decision tree, room-authoring checklist, local
  smoke-test loop, deploy steps.

## Docs

- [docs/PERF.md](docs/PERF.md): Read before quoting any performance number. Measured
  load-test results (20-player AOI room, 128 CCU across 8 rooms, the flush-throttle
  before/after). Cite these; never invent latency figures.
- [docs/COSTS.md](docs/COSTS.md): Read before quoting a per-room $ cost. Cloudflare DO
  duration + WebSocket request billing (the 20:1 rule applies to standard WS), worked at
  20/64/100 CCU, with verified-vs-estimated flags.
- [examples/starter/README.md](examples/starter/README.md): Read to see a complete
  game in ~150 lines (deploy-in-5-minutes cursor arena) and how to reshape it.

## Key sources

- [packages/server/src/room.ts](packages/server/src/room.ts): Read for the room API —
  `onMessage`, `markStateChanged`/`setState`, lifecycle hooks, `allowReconnection`,
  `setSimulationInterval`, `enableAOI`, and the `maxClients`/`syncIntervalMs`/`sendAcks`
  knobs.
- [packages/server/src/define-room.ts](packages/server/src/define-room.ts): Read for how
  a `Room` becomes a Durable Object (`defineRoom`), occupancy reporting, `validateSession`,
  and `onAuth`.
- [packages/client/src/index.ts](packages/client/src/index.ts): Read for the browser SDK
  — `GameClient` (`matchmake`, `joinOrCreate`) and `Room` (`send`, `onStateChange`,
  `onMessage`, `onAck`).
- [packages/schema/src/schema.ts](packages/schema/src/schema.ts): Read for the binary
  codec builders — `schema`, `mapOf`, `listOf`, `optionalOf`, `enumOf`, `str`, and
  `quant` (fixed-grid quantization, the bandwidth lever for continuous fields).
- [packages/protocol/src/index.ts](packages/protocol/src/index.ts): Read for the wire
  protocol — client/server message tags (incl. the `c:mbatch` input batch and subtick
  `ts`) and the JSON codec.
- [examples/starter/src/arena-room.ts](examples/starter/src/arena-room.ts): Read for a
  minimal, correct room to copy (validate-then-mutate handlers, reconnection).
- [apps/gateway/src/rooms/shooter-room.ts](apps/gateway/src/rooms/shooter-room.ts): Read
  for the FPS stack in practice — subtick lag-compensation rewind, AOI priority tiers, and
  a quantized codec on `IoArenaRoom`.
- [packages/rpg/src/engine.ts](packages/rpg/src/engine.ts): Read for the RPG combat engine —
  a deterministic, timer-heap-driven `RpgEngine` (skills, buffs, aggro/AI, damage, XP) whose
  sole driver is `tick(now)`. `serialize()`/`restore()` survive a Durable Object eviction.
- [apps/gateway/src/rooms/mmo-room.ts](apps/gateway/src/rooms/mmo-room.ts): Read for the
  reference `@tikron/rpg` integration — one engine per room fed player intents, `tick(now)`
  once per tick with a monotonic engine clock, unit state mirrored into a synced codec, and
  the returned `CombatEvent[]` broadcast as one batched `combat` message.

## Demos (live on tikron.dev)

- [.io demo](https://tikron.dev/agar.html): the flagship realtime arena (binary delta + AOI).
- [FPS demo](https://tikron.dev/shooter.html): hitscan shooter — subtick timestamps + server-side
  lag compensation + AOI priority tiers at up to 100 players in one room.
- [MMORPG demo](https://tikron.dev/mmo.html): server-authoritative RPG combat via `@tikron/rpg` —
  click-to-move, hotbar skills, a wolf pack + boss with aggro/AI, damage/XP, and eviction survival.

## Tooling

- [tools/create-tikron/README.md](tools/create-tikron/README.md): Read for the
  scaffolder (`npx create-tikron my-game`) — standalone project, SDK from npm; ships a
  condensed `AGENTS.md`, a green `npm test`, and vitest wiring into each generated project.
